Four Seasons Hotel Miami - Luxury Private Residences

Four Seasons Hotel Miami - Luxury Private Residences

1435 Brickell Avenue, Brickell, Miami, FL 33131, United States


Check In
Check Out
Adults
Children
Situated in Miami, 1.9 km from Bayfront Park Station and 1.8 km from the centre, Four Seasons Hotel Miami - Luxury Private Residences features air-conditioned accommodation with free WiFi, and an outdoor swimming pool. The accommodation features a hot tub. Each unit comes with a sofa, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a well-fitted kitchen with a dining area, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with bathrobes. A dishwasher, an oven and microwave are also available, as well as a kettle. The wellness area at the aparthotel is comprised of a spa facilities, a wellness packages and a beauty services. Four Seasons Hotel Miami - Luxury Private Residences has a garden and sun terrace. Bayside Market Place is 2.5 km from the accommodation, while Bayfront Park is 2.5 km from the property. The nearest airport is Miami International Airport, 12 km from Four Seasons Hotel Miami - Luxury Private Residences.
